title: Excessive Sweating in Actors: 8 Herbal Cream Remedies
description: Zingiber officinale creams have been used to help with excessive sweating due to its active properties. The main constituents, including gingerols and shogaols, have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to reduce sweat production. These compounds also have a cooling effect, which can provide immediate relief from hot and sweaty skin.
